title: Questions from Quarantine: Hurricane Season and COVID-19
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, which addresses public inquiries during the COVID-19 pandemic. It specifically highlights an episode focusing on the concurrent challenges of hurricane season and the coronavirus crisis, offering expert advice on managing these compounded emergencies. The series aims to provide guidance on maintaining safety and mental well-being during global crises, encouraging audience participation through social media with a designated hashtag. The content is presented under the Security and Global Health Project, emphasizing crisis management and public health strategies.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在解答COVID-19大流行期间公众的疑问。文章特别强调了一期节目，该节目聚焦于飓风季节与冠状病毒危机同时带来的挑战，并就如何应对这些叠加的紧急情况提供专家建议。该系列旨在为全球危机期间维护安全与心理健康提供指导，并通过指定的社交媒体标签鼓励观众参与。内容由安全与全球健康项目呈现，着重于危机管理和公共卫生策略。
